name: conversation mode — processMessage on CONVERSATION-mode project: gate fires, state stays DISCUSSION (PHASE-16.1 regression guard)
description: RED (before D2 gate): pipeline branch fires → state transitions to IDEATION → FAIL. GREEN (after D2 gate): conversation gate fires → handleConversationMode called → mode ≠ IDEATION_IN_PROGRESS AND active_runtime_state stays DISCUSSION → PASS.
